final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we, // write enable
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] invalid_memory; // 16-bit invalid_memory cell

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            invalid_memory <= data_in; // Write data to invalid_memory
        end
        data_out <= invalid_memory; // Always output the invalid_memory content
    end
endmodule
